item.title: CoolReader 3 [Ebook Software]
item.itunes:title: CoolReader 3 [Ebook Software]
item.itunes:author: loup
item.itunes:summary:
CoolReader 3
(Ebook Software)
CoolReader is fast and small cross-platform XML/CSS based eBook reader for desktops and handheld devices. Supported formats: FB2, TXT, RTF, DOC, TCR, HTML, EPUB, CHM, PDB, MOBI. Platforms: Win32, Linux, Android. Ported on some eInk based devices.
Features

Read electronic books in FB2, TXT, RTF, DOC, TCR, HTML, EPUB, CHM, PDB, MOBI formats
Stylesheet support
A lot of customizations for better reading performance


[read more]
item.description:
CoolReader 3
(Ebook Software)
CoolReader is fast and small cross-platform XML/CSS based eBook reader for desktops and handheld devices. Supported formats: FB2, TXT, RTF, DOC, TCR, HTML, EPUB, CHM, PDB, MOBI. Platforms: Win32, Linux, Android. Ported on some eInk based devices.
Features

Read electronic books in FB2, TXT, RTF, DOC, TCR, HTML, EPUB, CHM, PDB, MOBI formats
Stylesheet support
A lot of customizations for better reading performance


[read more]

(Ebook Software)
CoolReader is fast and small cross-platform XML/CSS based eBook reader for desktops and handheld devices. Supported formats: FB2, TXT, RTF, DOC, TCR, HTML, EPUB, CHM, PDB, MOBI. Platforms: Win32, Linux, Android. Ported on some eInk based devices.
Features

Read electronic books in FB2, TXT, RTF, DOC, TCR, HTML, EPUB, CHM, PDB, MOBI formats
Stylesheet support
A lot of customizations for better reading performance


[read more]

item.title: WholeClear MBOX to PST Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: WholeClear MBOX to PST Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: ellasmith
item.itunes:summary:
WholeClear MBOX to PST Converter
(Utilities)
The WholeClear MBOX to PST Converter download free and convert/Migrate MBOX to Outlook PST files in Outlook. By using this tool users can simply convert all emails and attachments from MBOX to PST file format without losing any single bit of data. It works with all mbox-supported email clients such as - Thunderbird, Eudora, OperaMail, PocoMail, Entourage, AppleMail, etc. The Migration of MBOX files to the Outlook PST file format does not require the installation of Outlook. However, before the process of conversion, this program permits you to check and scan your MBOX data. The MBOX to PST Converter operates with every version of Microsoft Outlook such as 2021, 2019, 2016, 2013, and 2010. As a result, it works with all versions of Windows up to 11. Technical and non-technical users can both use this tool since it is user-friendly. Your technical support staff is available around-the-clock, before purchasing this tool users must try its free trial pack. Users can get a demo version of this program from its official website if they want to know more about it.
https://www.wholeclear.com/mbox/pst/

[read more]

WholeClear MBOX to PST Converter
(Utilities)
The WholeClear MBOX to PST Converter download free and convert/Migrate MBOX to Outlook PST files in Outlook. It works with all mbox-supported email clients such as - Thunderbird, Eudora, OperaMail, PocoMail, Entourage, AppleMail, etc. The Migration of MBOX files to the Outlook PST file format does not require the installation of Outlook. The MBOX to PST Converter operates with every version of Microsoft Outlook such as 2021, 2019, 2016, 2013, and 2010. As a result, it works with all versions of Windows up to 11. Technical and non-technical users can both use this tool since it is user-friendly. [read more]

By using this tool users can simply convert all emails and attachments from MBOX to PST file format without losing any single bit of data. It works with all mbox-supported email clients such as - Thunderbird, Eudora, OperaMail, PocoMail, Entourage, AppleMail, etc. The Migration of MBOX files to the Outlook PST file format does not require the installation of Outlook. However, before the process of conversion, this program permits you to check and scan your MBOX data. The MBOX to PST Converter operates with every version of Microsoft Outlook such as 2021, 2019, 2016, 2013, and 2010. As a result, it works with all versions of Windows up to 11. Technical and non-technical users can both use this tool since it is user-friendly. item.title: OST to PST Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: OST to PST Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: ost-to-pst-converter
item.itunes:summary:
OST to PST Converter
(Utilities)
SysInspire OST to PST Converter Software will help to convert Outlook OST file data to Outlook PST without any data loss. It can convert OST files to PST and 13+ other file formats including MBOX, Office 365, Gmail, Yahoo Mail, vCard, EML, EMLX, CSV, MSG, ICS, HTML, MHTML, etc. This software is designed with a simple user interface that can be used by every person, even if they have no technical knowledge. Our teams are always available 24/7 via email and chat to solve any queries related to the OST to PST conversion process. If you are not satisfied with using this converter software, in this case, our company provides a money-back guarantee within 30 days.

[read more]

item.itunes:author: businessbarcode

2d Barcode Generator Software
(Office Apps)
www.businessbarcodes.org website to download 2d Barcode Generator Software offers smart solution for easily creating most attractive labels saved in jpeg, png, wmf, tiff and exif. Barcode label creator application prints multi-copies of same label on a single paper.

item.title: Pen drive File Recovery Application [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Pen drive File Recovery Application [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: ntfsfilerecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Pen drive File Recovery Application
(Utilities)
Is it possible to get back deleted documents folder without facing any difficulty? Download well developed Pen drive File Recovery Software that easily retrieve user valuable office documents, birthday photographs, wedding video clips, holiday picture and many more from accidentally formatted flash storage drive. Free data revival application is simple to operate and provide facility to restore lost or missing folder at user specified location on computer system. Affordable USB file rescue program support recovery of various types of files such as music, audio, video, image, text etc from corrupted pen drive.

[read more]
